description: A powerful late-game physical attack item that greatly increases damage output. Best used by assassins and marksmen to finish low-health enemies.
unique_passive: Despair: Deals 25% extra damage to enemies below 50% HP.

description: A core critical item for marksmen and fighters that boosts critical chance and critical damage.
unique_passive: Doom: Critical hits deal increased critical damage.

description: Excellent for attack speed heroes. Slows enemies while increasing attack speed continuously.
unique_passive: Corrosion: Basic attacks slow enemy movement speed.

description: Best anti-tank item for marksmen. Deals percentage HP damage to enemies.
unique_passive: Devour: Basic attacks deal 9% of target's current HP as bonus damage.

description: A powerful defense item against burst mages and magic assassins.
unique_passive: Shield: Reduces magic damage taken after receiving magic burst.

description: Revives the hero after death with bonus HP and shield. Best late-game survival item.
unique_passive: Immortal: Revives hero 2.5 seconds after death.

description: Massive magic power boost for burst mages.
unique_passive: Mystery: Greatly increases total magic power.

description: Highest magic power item in the game. Great for scaling mages.
unique_passive: Guard: Converts magic power into shield.
